feed.title: Wmasday
feed.subtitle: Security Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with experience in offensive security, application security testing, vulnerability research, and secure software development.

entry.title: Welcome to My Personal Blog
entry.summary: Welcome to my personal developer blog and portfolio site! This site is built using the Jekyll Chirpy template and hosted on GitHub Pages. Here, I’ll be sharing my journey, write-ups, research, and projects related to Full-Stack Development, Cybersecurity, Penetration Testing, and emerging tech like Blockchain and Machine Learning. What to Expect In future posts, I plan to cover topics includ...
